# Direct Booking Health Score

> A free hotel technology and direct booking strategy audit tool built by Bookassist. Hotels answer 20 questions about their tech stack and receive an AI-powered health score identifying revenue leakage from OTA dependency.

## About

The Direct Booking Health Score helps independent hotels and hotel groups assess the maturity of their direct booking infrastructure. It scores hotels across five categories: booking engine, metasearch, CRM, analytics, and marketing. The output is a scored report with AI-generated recommendations for reducing OTA commission costs.

This tool is built and maintained by Bookassist, a hotel direct booking technology company.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://directbookinghealthscore.com/): Overview and tool launch
- [Hotel Audit Tool](https://directbookinghealthscore.com/hotel-audit): The 20-question direct booking health audit
- [Blog](https://directbookinghealthscore.com/blog): Weekly articles on hotel direct booking strategy and technology
- [Contact](https://directbookinghealthscore.com/contact): Contact Bookassist for a demo or consultation

## Blog

- [Why Most Hotels Are Losing 20% of Revenue to OTAs Without Realising It](https://directbookinghealthscore.com/blog/why-hotels-lose-money-to-otas): OTA commissions are the silent profit killer for independent hotels. Understanding exactly where your revenue leaks helps you take it back.

## Key Concepts

- **Direct Booking Health Score**: A 0-100% score measuring a hotel's direct booking infrastructure maturity
- **OTA Dependency**: Over-reliance on Online Travel Agencies (Booking.com, Expedia) at the expense of direct revenue
- **Metasearch**: Price comparison channels (Google Hotel Ads, Trivago, Kayak) where hotels can bid for direct bookings
- **Booking Engine**: The software on a hotel website that takes direct reservations
- **CRM**: Customer Relationship Management - tools for managing guest data and driving repeat bookings
- **Rate Parity**: Ensuring direct prices are competitive against OTA prices

## Languages

This tool is available in English, Italian (Italiano), and Spanish (Espanol).

## Technology

Built with Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, and Google Gemini AI.

## Contact

For more information about direct booking technology, visit https://bookassist.org
